title: BPSC Civil Judge PCS J Online Form 2026
description: BPSC Bihar Civil Judge PCS J Recruitment 2026 Apply Online for 173 Post Post Update Date: 17-03-2026 Short Description : Bihar Public Service Commission (BPSC) Online Form 2026 | Judicial Services Competitive 33 Examination 2026. has invited online applications for the Post of Judicial Services Competitive 33 Recruitment 2026 , with the official notification already released, offering a Total of 173 Post , Eligible candidates can fill the form from 25/02/2026 to 18/03/2026 , so interested app...
